/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/core/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/entity/GameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/entity/Components.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/entity/Collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/player/Wizard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/player/Spell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/player/SpellBook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/player/Progression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/mob/MobAI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/mob/Goblin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/mob/Archer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/mob/Ogre.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/mob/Spawner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/mob/Dragon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/world/Terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/world/ForestMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/ui/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wizardbattle.dir/src/ui/DamageNumbers.cpp.o -o wizardbattle  -lSDL3 -lGLEW -lGL -lX11 -lGLU -lOpenGL -lopenal
